query: SELECT l.name as liga, c.name as pais, COUNT(t.id) as total_times FROM teams t JOIN leagues l ON t.leagueId = l.id JOIN countries c ON t.countryId = c.id GROUP BY l.id, l.name, c.name ORDER BY c.name, l.division;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35VGbBGUduuhukx.298441852ba3 --database hhB4oykfDQM9yCvhQGaX3n --execute SELECT l.name as liga, c.name as pais, COUNT(t.id) as total_times FROM teams t JOIN leagues l ON t.leagueId = l.id JOIN countries c ON t.countryId = c.id GROUP BY l.id, l.name, c.name ORDER BY c.name, l.division;
